demo_timestamps.description: Introduction to Fabrics and overview of its platform capabilities
Demo of measure repair via Autodesk Design Automation API
Automatic build generation using Autodesk APS
CNC quoting and simulation using machine learning and Autodesk APS

client_mentions.name: HP
client_mentions.context: Partnership with HP for integrating build sending and status tracking

summary: The video presents how Fabrics leverages Autodesk technology to automate and optimize manufacturing processes. It highlights use cases in measure repair, automatic build generation, and CNC quoting, showcasing significant time savings and efficiency improvements. Partnerships and integration with companies like HP are also discussed as part of Fabrics' solution offerings.
